prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-AIRPORT-CITY-50PC-SET Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: Kidplay Diecast Cars Urban City Airport Playset Kids Toys, 50pc Description: Your little airplane enthusiast will be ready for takeoff and landing with this Kidplay 50pc Diecast Cars Urban City Airport Playset.

Kids imagination will soar, as they're inspired to create their own airport rescue adventures with friends and family. This deluxe 50-piece air terminal airport playset is excellent for hours of entertainment and great for both indoor and for outdoor play time. With an all-encompassing toy airfield rescue set, your child will be able to use their imagination for pretend play, while also improving their fine motor skills when handling and setting up all the airport playset components.

The multi-piece diecast car and airplane urban city playset includes a unique variety of car toys such as big rig trucks, performance race cars, and a variety of aircraft from commuter aircraft to military jet fights and more. Along with the numerous transportation vehicles, this playset provides multiple construction cones and road signs for your little air traffic controller to create many imaginative aircraft and car rescue scenarios.

Not only will your little pilot in training be thrilled and occupied for hours with this full airport rescue set, he or she will be developing crucial early educational skills that will better help them to understand traffic and airport dynamics; Your little toddler will grow and develop their motor skills, as well as their creativity too. Search Terms: urban city diecast cars airport playset toys for boys kids toys Christmas gifts Hanukkah police vehicle accessories learning toys airplane jets semi truck accessories semi truck toy ambulance toys for boys pretend play Features: - URBAN CITY AIRPORT PLAYSET: Recreate the hustle and bustle of a busy airport with this Deluxe Diecast Airport City Rescue Micro Wheels 50-piece play set! Offering an abundance of toy play choices from commuter aircrafts and helicopters, to fighter jets and police vehicles, your child will love creating scenarios of airport rescue with friends and family - IMAGINATIVE PRETEND PLAY: Your little air traffic controller can handle all the incoming arrivals and departure of their very own airport with this multi-piece Diecast Airfield toy set; With a wide variety of airplanes and vehicles to play with, their imaginary pretend play role play airport will spark constant creativity and new playtime adventures - PLAYTIME DURABILITY: The durable Diecast metal design provides an opportunity for both indoor and outdoor fun; Whether it is outside defending the skies or inside providing a raceway for their sprint cars, this deluxe multi-piece Micro Wheels playset will stand up to all rescue missions - FUN LEARNING TOYS: Not only will your little pilot be thrilled and occupied for hours with this Air Terminal Rescue playset, he or she will be developing crucial early critical thinking and problem-solving skills, as well as developing their fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination when handling and setting up the play set - SPECIFICATIONS: Color: Multi; Material: Plastic, Metal; Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts); Age: 3+; Assembly Required: No; Batteries Required: No === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
